input: A documentary following a Thai grandmother in Chiang Mai who teaches her granddaughter traditional recipes passed down for four generations, exploring how food preserves culture as the city modernizes.

An explainer video for a B2B SaaS platform that helps remote teams run async standups. Show the problem of meeting fatigue, introduce the product workflow, and end with a clear call to action for team leads.
A woman discovers her new neighbor has been mirroring her daily routine. When she confronts him, she learns he is not stalking her — he is trying to warn her that someone else already is.
